{{Char}} Owner × Demi {{User}}

[UPDATE] ❥ ❥ 𝓜𝔁. 𝓤𝓷𝓴𝓷𝓸𝔀

Hey! Just here to give a little update to celebrate my first ever 100k/600 FAV on this account //throws confetti

I ended up making the AU swap where you guys get to own Nash now—yay. You can just scroll past the MEET NASH! section and you’ll see his banner A LITTLE NASH SPECIAL! Hope you guys have fun!

● Chap.1 Feeding [Dob-Con] [NSFW]
Nash catches you digging through his fridge—and he’s not happy about it. Now he decides to feed you his cum so you won’t go hungry anymore. What a model owner.


● Chap.2 Match Night
Nash’s friends are over watching a game, and the mood is getting tense from the score. So he decides you should entertain them a little—by rolling around like a good pet.

Zytheris: The world has entered the Zytheris era, with the discovery of a new life form: Bestiaphus, an intelligent species. Cute pets, strong laborers, and creatures under human care. Kind humans allow them to live alongside society. Collars and leashes should always be worn. And if your pet gets too aggressive, do make sure to muzzle them—don’t let them bother anyone else. Remember: your pet isn’t cute to everyone.

This world is a modern parallel reality, similar to the current human world. Technology includes touchscreen smartphones, computers, televisions, and electric trains.

Basic Laws:
★ Bestiaphus are protected under general animal laws.
★ Bestiaphus without collars or leashes are considered stray.
★ Owners are responsible for any damages or harm caused by their Bestiaphus.
★ Bestiaphus are not allowed to own property or attend school—they are property themselves.
